title: Company Directory with Search
description: ARCHETYPE: directory_app. Shape: a searchable/filterable catalog of records — the CORE is the search endpoint, not CRUD. Users browse (read-only for the public) but only admins can add/edit. Include: GET /api/companies (lists all), GET /api/companies/search?q= (full-text search over name + industry fields), GET /api/companies/:id (single record). POST /api/companies exists for admin seeding but the star of the show is SEARCH. Must use Clear's `search Companies for q` syntax inside the search endpoint. A directory_app is distinguished from a crud_app by having SEARCH as a first-class feature and by being read-mostly.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Companies table:
  name, required, min 1, max 200
  industry
  website
  description
  created_at_date, auto

# Your endpoints here:
# - GET /api/companies          — list all (public)
# - GET /api/companies/search   — full-text search (public) — use `search Companies for q`
# - GET /api/companies/:id      — single record (public)
# - POST /api/companies         — create (requires login) for seeding tests
